Document Actions Test File

This document is used to test document action functionality such as:
- Delete operations
- Download operations  
- Menu interactions
- Document management features

Document Properties:
- Purpose: Action Testing
- Status: Test Document
- Actions Available: Delete, Download, Rename, Move
- Access: Full Access

Test Scenarios:
1. Right-click context menu
2. Action button menu
3. Bulk selection actions
4. Individual document actions

Business Content:
Invoice Number: INV-2025-001
Amount: $1,250.00
Due Date: October 1, 2025
Client: Test Client LLC

This document should support all standard document management operations.
